results.label: Emergency Presentation

extraction.chief_complaint: Acute substernal chest pain with radiation to jaw

results.summary: 67-year-old male with STEMI (ST elevation V1-V4, troponin 4.2) presenting with chest pain and hemodynamic instability. Emergent PCI activated.

results.label: Routine Visit

extraction.urgency_assessment: Healthy patient with no acute concerns. Routine preventive care.

results.summary: Healthy 44-year-old female presenting for annual wellness exam with no complaints, normal vitals, and unremarkable physical exam. Routine labs ordered and flu vaccine given.

results.label: Moderate Acuity

extraction.chief_complaint: Acute gout flare of right first MTP joint
extraction.urgency_assessment: Acute gout flare in known gout patient. Painful but not dangerous.

results.summary: 52-year-old male with known gout presenting with acute flare of right first MTP joint after dietary indiscretion. Joint aspirate confirms diagnosis with negatively birefringent crystals.
